name: Poulet Nouvelle Orleans
recipeIngredient: 2 fryers, skins off, cut into 4 (2 lb each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place the chicken in a bowl of milk mixed with salt and pepper, cover, and refrigerate for 2 hours.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, oil, and 1/4 cup water.
4. Drain the chicken pieces and toss them in flour until coated. Dip each piece into the egg mixture, pressing to ensure it adheres.
5. Cut tomatoes into halves. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Cut sausages into slices (2 or 3).
7. Cook the chicken pieces in plenty of oil over medium heat for 30 to 35 minutes until golden brown and cooked through.
8. Transfer the chicken pieces to an oven-safe dish and keep them warm in a preheated oven with the door slightly open.
9. Using the same fat from cooking the chicken, cook the sausages and bacon until done.
10. Drain excess fat from the sausages and bacon using paper towels.
11. Discard all remaining fat but reserve 2 tablespoons for cooking the tomatoes.
12. Cook the corn.
13. Arrange the cooked chicken in the center of a plate. Place slices of bacon on top, and surround with the rest of the ingredients.
14. Serve with lemon wedges and barbecue sauce.
